mapper.select: SELECT lv.level_seq AS levelId, lv.level_name AS levelName, ch.chapter_id AS chapterId, ch.chapter_name AS chapterName, ch.test_reward AS testReward, ch.test_pay AS testPay, ls.lesson_id AS lessonId, ls.lesson_name AS lessonName, ls.lesson_type AS lessonType FROM learning_level AS lv JOIN learning_chapter AS ch ON lv.level_seq = ch.level_seq JOIN learning_lesson AS ls ON ch.chapter_id = ls.chapter_id WHERE lv.level_seq = #{level_seq} and ch.chapter_id = #{chapter_id}
select level_seq AS levelId, level_name AS levelName from learning_level

select lv.level_seq AS levelId, ch.chapter_id AS chapterId, ch.chapter_name AS chapterName, ch.test_reward AS testReward, ch.test_pay AS testPay from learning_level as lv left join learning_chapter as ch on lv.level_seq = ch.level_seq where lv.level_seq = #{level_seq}

select ch.chapter_id AS chapterId, ls.lesson_id AS lessonId, ls.lesson_name AS lessonName, ls.lesson_type AS lessonType from learning_chapter as ch left join learning_lesson as ls on ch.chapter_id = ls.chapter_id where ch.chapter_id = #{chapter_id}
select result_seq as resultId, lesson_id as lessonId, user_seq as userId, started_at as startDate, finished_at as endDate from user_question_result where user_seq = #{user_seq}
